task_completion.description: Verify the passage plan document contains the correct Squat calculation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/PassagePlanning/ukc_passage_plan.txt'. It must include a calculated Squat value of approximately 0.295m (or 0.2952m).

task_completion.description: Verify the passage plan document contains the correct minimum required tide and safe transit windows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'ukc_passage_plan.txt'. It must state a minimum required Tidal Height of approximately 2.90m and identify a safe transit window (e.g., 06:00 to 13:30).

task_completion.description: Verify the Bridge Command environment.ini file is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation or editing of '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Southampton Deep Draft Transit/environment.ini'. It should show Setting='Solent', Month=11, and a StartTime set 1 hour before the chosen optimal window (e.g., between 05:00 and 08:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the Bridge Command ownship.ini file is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'ownship.ini' in the new scenario folder. It must contain Name='MT Pacific Voyager', Speed=6.0, Latitude between 50.75 and 50.85, and Longitude between -1.40 and -1.20.

task_completion.description: Verify the Bridge Command othership.ini file is configured with traffic vessels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'othership.ini' in the new scenario folder. It must contain configurations for at least 2 different traffic vessels.

task_completion.description: Verify the bc5.ini configuration is updated for Full Radar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the editing of 'bc5.ini'. It must show settings enabling Full Radar, with Max Range set to 48 (nm) and Range Resolution set to 128 (cells).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually read the source data files to perform calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal history or editor tabs to ensure the agent opened/read the tidal, vessel, and channel data files in '/home/ga/Documents/PassagePlanning/' rather than hallucinating the values.

integrity.description: Verify the required files were actually saved to the correct directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'ls', 'cat', or editor save confirmations indicating that 'ukc_passage_plan.txt' and the scenario '.ini' files were written to disk in their specified paths, not just printed to stdout.

integrity.description: Verify the agent provided a genuine justification for the chosen window.
integrity.visual_evidence: Read the justification section in 'ukc_passage_plan.txt'. It should be written in natural language explaining the safety margin, rather than just copy-pasting the prompt instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: 1) Calculated Squat must be approximately 0.2952m. 2) Minimum required Tidal Height must be approximately 2.90m. 3) Safe transit windows must include the morning window of 06:00 to 13:30 UTC. 4) The optimal start window is between 06:00 and 09:00, so the environment.ini StartTime should be set exactly 1 hour before the chosen optimal start (i.e., a value between 05:00 and 08:00).
